title: vitellariopsis ferruginea
intro: Vitellariopsis ferruginea, also known as the Iron-plated Orange Bushwillow, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its potential to reduce fever, relieve rheumatism, and alleviate respiratory issues. The extracts from Vitellariopsis ferruginea have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including malaria and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Vitellariopsis ferruginea include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and to treat specific health issues.
